question.label: Growth blockers
question.name: What's in your way of getting to the next level — not what's missing, what's actively blocking?
question.description: Forces specificity about obstacles rather than vague 'more opportunities please'.

assessment.note: The answer 'don't know' provides no specific signal about growth blockers or clarity.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?

new_queue.label: Current work landscape
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Leadership readiness
new_queue.name: What about leading a team excites you the most?

new_queue.label: Delegation comfort
new_queue.name: How comfortable are you with delegating tasks currently?

new_queue.label: Communication for leadership
new_queue.name: What do you think is key in communicating effectively as a team leader?

new_queue.label: Understanding expectations
new_queue.name: What do you believe are the key expectations for a team lead role?

new_queue.label: Impact through leadership
new_queue.name: How would leading the team amplify your impact?

new_queue.label: Current priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are your top priorities this week, and why?

new_queue.label: Role stretch
new_queue.name: What part of the team lead role do you think will stretch you the most?

new_queue.label: Energy and sustainability
new_queue.name: How's your energy holding up with the current workload?

new_queue.label: Future learning areas
new_queue.name: What new skills or knowledge do you feel you need to develop for the team lead role?
